findings.title: Duplicated narrator resolution logic
findings.why_it_matters: The identical 5-line narrator extraction pattern appears in detectFormat (lines 51-61) and mapAbsItemToBook (lines 163-172). Any future change to narrator resolution (e.g., adding a new ABS metadata field) must be made in both places. This is a maintenance trap — one copy will inevitably be missed.
evidence: Line 53-61: const rawNarrators = ...; const narratorNames = rawNarrators.length > 0 ? ... : ...
Both blocks handle the same (string | {name:string})[] array and narratorName fallback
findings.suggested_fix: Extract a shared resolveNarratorNames(absItem: AbsLibraryItem): string[] helper, export it, and use it in both detectFormat and mapAbsItemToBook

residual_risks: detectFormat and mapAbsItemToBook both resolve duration independently (line 64 vs line 207). Slightly different patterns (with vs without || undefined) but functionally equivalent.
